title: Pachymitra rufa
taxonomy: Pachymitra rufa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Pachymitra, which is a group of flowering plants. The species is native to Madagascar. Pachymitra rufa is a type of succulent plant that is adapted to the island's dry and arid climate. It is a relatively rare and unique species within the Apocynaceae family.
